name: kbridge-ratchet-31-animate
description: Coverage-campaign showcase: ratchet_31 sat in the dropped-joints bucket since the first scoreboard - the extraction emitted UnknownJointType joints it could not classify. F2's screw-fit of the recorded relative motion recovered them (constant pose -> welds, single-axis rotation -> revolutes) and B-bug-014's orientation-carrying weld frames let it assemble in 0 iters. Sweep drives the emitted driver joint_0 0->170 deg, 35/35 steps, no overrides. Pass/fail = Converged + SlopSuccess. doc=MM, CPig-only. Slop: KinematicBridge/out/_slop-side-by-side/ratchet-31-bind-sweep-animate.canary.slop.json.

setup.vlmDescription: A ratchet mechanism as shaded solid CAD parts: a toothed ratchet wheel, a pawl resting against the teeth, a crank arm posed mid-rotation by the solver, a T-slider and coil spring, on base brackets, overlaid with a CPig frame-triad skeleton, at a sane scale.

checkpoints.name: persp
checkpoints.description: ratchet_31 posed mid-sweep by CPig's solve; the F2 motion-recovered joints hold the pawl/spring train together.
